VERCEL DEPLOYMENT SETUP
=======================

Follow these steps to enable automatic deployment to Vercel via GitHub Actions:

STEP 1: Install Vercel CLI locally
-----------------------------------
npm install -g vercel

STEP 2: Login to Vercel
------------------------
vercel login

STEP 3: Link your project to Vercel
------------------------------------
cd Kolam
vercel link

This will create a .vercel directory with project.json containing:
- orgId (VERCEL_ORG_ID)
- projectId (VERCEL_PROJECT_ID)

STEP 4: Get your Vercel Token
------------------------------
1. Go to https://vercel.com/account/tokens
2. Click "Create Token"
3. Name it: "GitHub Actions Texture"
4. Copy the token (VERCEL_TOKEN)

STEP 5: Add GitHub Secrets
---------------------------
Go to your GitHub repo → Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions

Add these secrets:

1. VERCEL_TOKEN
   Value: [token from step 4]

2. VERCEL_ORG_ID
   Value: [orgId from .vercel/project.json]

3. VERCEL_PROJECT_ID
   Value: [projectId from .vercel/project.json]

4. VITE_API_URL (optional)
   Value: https://your-backend-url.com/api/v1
   (or leave empty to use default localhost for dev)

STEP 6: Push to GitHub
-----------------------
git add .
git commit -m "Add Vercel deployment workflow"
git push origin main

The GitHub Action will automatically deploy to Vercel!

STEP 7: Verify Deployment
--------------------------
1. Go to your GitHub repo → Actions tab
2. Watch the "Deploy to Vercel" workflow run
3. Once complete, visit your Vercel dashboard to see the deployment

MANUAL DEPLOYMENT (optional)
-----------------------------
To deploy manually from your local machine:

cd Kolam
vercel --prod

TROUBLESHOOTING
---------------
- If build fails, check the GitHub Actions logs
- Ensure all secrets are correctly set in GitHub
- Verify that pnpm build works locally first
- Check that VITE_API_URL points to your backend

UPDATING BACKEND URL
--------------------
If your backend URL changes, update the VITE_API_URL secret in GitHub:
Repo → Settings → Secrets → Actions → Edit VITE_API_URL
